title: そういう時間だって必要

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Dober, your last match was, um... really close!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Cheer up! I'm sure your next race will go just fine!
Everyone's here for you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you, but I'm fine. I promise to keep trying
my best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. I'll keep it up... I guess.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You're fine. No coffee was spilled. And... my
friend moved out of the way just in time.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you exhausted? It must take a lot of
energy... to fake being happy.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You can't keep this up when you're down... I think
it's perfectly fine to admit that.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...See you around, Miss Clumsy. Surely you, too,
sometimes crave time alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll just finish up this coffee first. That
leaves me a little time to relax...
